title: oxybaphus aggregatus
intro: Oxybaphus aggregatus, also known as the Clump Bee Balm or Aggregated Bee Balm, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Oxybaphus aggregatus is also valued for its antioxidant and antiseptic properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Oxybaphus aggregatus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other minor ailments.
